title: A Very Dark Place
purpose: Mental toughness and sustained threshold power

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/4. 10:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 10:00 at 95-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 10min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 90-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 10:00 at 102%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 30 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 33 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 57% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 19 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 105% at 85-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 57% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 57% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 69% done. 0 intervals left. 16 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 28min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 44 minutes of work done. 16 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 16 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 6:00 at 108%. Then 10min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 102-108% FTP, 80-80 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 6:00 at 108%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 6:00 at 108%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 108% × 6:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 84% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
